data.content: Implementation review approved. Reviewed branch codex/119c-overview-hide-empty at 5761392ea2376a7799f21d5e15bbe85c954e042d against origin/main. The diff is limited to overview column state/rendering and focused tests; behavior covers persistence at zero count, empty-only Hide, manual removal, and reintroduction when beats return. Sanity gates passed after rebasing onto current origin/main: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
